description:
Local multi-cloud simulator (AWS/GCP/Azure) with real backends

Vyomi gives you AWS, GCP, and Azure-like experiences on your laptop.
Standard provider SDKs (boto3, google-cloud-*, azure-sdk-*) and CLIs
(aws, gcloud, az, terraform) work natively against the simulator by
overriding the endpoint URL — no shim required.

The MSI installs the `vyomi` launcher; the full simulator stack runs
inside a Multipass VM that `vyomi up` provisions.
